meta.title: Apartment 103 — Holiday Rental
meta.description: Book your perfect stay at Apartment 103. A beautifully designed holiday apartment.

hero.description: A cosy apartment nestled between the mountains and Lake Walensee. Stunning alpine scenery, ski slopes and a lakeshore beach right on your doorstep.

zurich.title: 45 min from Zurich
zurich.desc: Easy train connection to Zurich city centre — perfect for a day trip or a late arrival.

ski.title: 5 min to the ski lift
ski.desc: Hit the slopes in minutes. Flumserberg ski resort is right above the village.

beach.title: 2 min to the beach
beach.desc: Lake Walensee's crystal-clear waters are a 2-minute stroll from the apartment.

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to remember your language and currency preferences. Do you allow us to store these cookies?

booking.noCharge: No charge yet — you'll review before confirming
